title: senecio coleophyllus
intro: Senecio coleophyllus, also known as Irish fleabane, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a digestive aid and to treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Irish fleabane can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
